summary: ADR 0388 Keycloak OIDC centralization: 9 services converged with unified realm URL and OIDC client configuration.

verification.observed: 9 services (Harbor, Semaphore, Woodpecker, Gitea, Grist, Outline, etc.) using centralized Keycloak realm URL and OIDC configuration.

notes: Harbor OIDC fix included — client secret fallback added when Keycloak bootstrap unavailable.
